cards.name: Knight of Cups
cards.interpretation: idealist, charming, artistic, graceful, tactful, diplomatic, mediator, negotiator

cards.name: Knight of Pentacles
cards.interpretation: practical, reliable, efficient, stoic, slow and steady, hard-working, committed, patient, conservative

cards.name: 7 of Wands, reversed
cards.interpretation: giving up, admitting defeat, yielding, lack of self belief, surrender
